entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0012 (P00003) awarded to GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MODIFY THE PRICING EXHIBIT WITH MAILING COST FOR CR 3192.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTION
THIS MODIFICATION INCORPORATES AN FSA LOCAL CLAUSE THAT PROVIDES INSTRUCTIONS ON NOTIFICATION REQUIREMENTS WHEN EMPLOYEES DEPART FROM A CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0012 (P00104) awarded to GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF JUNE 17, 2009 TO JUNE 16, 2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE FAR CLAUSES 52.212-4 AND 52.212-5 IN ACCORDANCE WITH DEVIATION 2017-02. THIS MODIFICATION ALSO PROVIDES INVOICING GUIDANCE FOR WORK COMPLETED IN ACCORDANCE WITH CHANGE REQUEST (CR) 3571.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:UEILegalBusinessName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

ns1:vendor.ns1:contractorName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.
